scope: Europe and United States, excluding six European microstates
laborGeography: National for European cities; state-level for U.S. cities
usWageMethod: Existing U.S. net median monthly anchor scaled by the 2025 Q4 state/U.S. QCEW average-weekly-wage ratio
usEmploymentMethod: BLS 2025 11-month provisional state employment-population ratio for ages 25-54
